title: Ice Cream - Uniform Tools
description: For the classic enjoyers! Changes all the tools to be the same shape as the iron ones.
body:
![Uniform Tools Logo](https://i.postimg.cc/j2j61F4B/uniformtoolslogo.png) ---
--- Uniform Tools is a resource pack who prefer something simple and uniform over the unique tools that Ice Cream uses. This pack changes the tools to look like Ice Cream's iron tools. --- ![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6ZWGVqwU/images/e77a741a7dcd14c390e2abbb9a5b22d84a3c8679.png) --- ## Frequently Asked Questions
How do I install this pack? I'd recommend following [this](https://www.planetminecraft.com/blog/how-to-install-minecraft-texture-packs-4615399/) guide on PlanetMinecraft. Enjoy!
Are there any other Ice Cream add-ons? Yes! Ice Cream has multiple add-ons available for you to download! My own add-ons exist out of;
[Ice Cream 3D Add-On](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-add-on) [Uniform Tools](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/uniform-tools)
[Ice Cream x Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ice-cream-fa)
[Ice Cream Dusky UI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dusky-ui)
On top of that, Ice Cream also adds support for Enchanted_Games' [Tasty Items](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tasty-items) \ [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)' Hunger Preview Just be sure to put my add-ons above Ice Cream and the other ones below it in the selected resource packs screen. Like this; ![Selected packs](https://i.postimg.cc/NGWz62XR/selectedgif.gif)
I've found a bug or got a suggestion! Hi! Thank you for your contribution, join my Discord server [here](https://discord.gg/fV9aby4XGG) and feel free to show it in #general.
Terms Of Service You're allowed to alter and edit any of Ice Cream's textures as long as you don't distribute it. Keep it to yourself.
If you want to create your own add-on for Ice Cream, feel free to! Just be sure to provide a link to the Modrinth Page.
---
